description_long: This lantern features a robust, boxy metal frame with dark, weathered surfaces and prominent riveted bands reinforcing each edge. The lantern is suspended by a heavy-duty chain attached to a spiked top, giving it a rugged, almost medieval appearance. Its panels are adorned with glowing turquoise graffiti-like markings, adding a modern urban twist to its otherwise gothic design. The front panel has a small barred window, behind which two glowing yellow eyes peer out, suggesting an eerie or whimsical character within. The metalwork is accented by sharp spikes at the corners, enhancing its intimidating look. The overall construction appears solid and durable, suitable for outdoor urban environments.
description: A heavy, spiked metal lantern with glowing turquoise graffiti and a barred window revealing two yellow eyes, suspended by a thick chain.
description_view_0: Front view shows the barred window with two glowing yellow eyes and the most prominent graffiti markings.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the spiked corners and additional turquoise graffiti, with no visible window.
description_view_2: Back view displays a large graffiti symbol and the solid metal panel, lacking any window or eyes.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals more graffiti and spiked details, similar to the left but with different markings.
